programs.desc: Mia Miejer learns that her Mimi must sell property which has been in their family for generations.

programs.desc: A man's engagement plans get upended when his girlfriend takes him to her family's farm instead.

programs.desc: A family must save its Smoky Mountains berry farm against all odds.

programs.title: I Heard the Bells
programs.desc: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow puts down his pen after a tragedy, until Christmas reignites his voice.

programs.title: Christmas at the Drive-In
programs.desc: A property lawyer finds romance during the holidays while trying to save her town's local drive-in.
